title: Main Training Pipeline
startup_phase: Load YAML schema (config_default) and merge with config YAML + CLI dotlist overrides via OmegaConf
main_function_flow: 1. prepare_config(config): set LOCAL_RANK from env, set vae_path default, set use_lora default
2. Build Accelerator: configure DDP kwargs, AutocastKwargs, optionally FSDP plugin (use_fsdp) or DeepSpeed plugin (use_deepspeed, zero_stage=2)
3. Set logging verbosity (main vs. non-main process)
4. [Optional] set_seed(config.seed) if seed provided
5. [Main process] mkdir output_dir, save config.yaml via OmegaConf.save
6. Load VAE: load_vae(config.vae_backbone, config.vae_path) inside deepspeed_zero_init_disabled context
7. Determine weight_dtype (fp16 / bf16) from accelerator.mixed_precision
8. Instantiate transformer: LatentRecon(config)
9. [Optional] Load LPIPS loss module if lambda_lpips > 0
10. [Optional] Load pretrained ckpt into transformer if resume_pretrained_model_ckpt set
11. Freeze/unfreeze modules: transformer.train(), transformer.requires_grad_(False); cast VAE/modules to weight_dtype
12. [Optional] torch.compile(vae.encode) if compile_frozen_modules
13. [Optional] Add LoRA adapter via peft.LoraConfig if use_lora
14. Define save_model_hook(models, weights, output_dir): saves transformer (+ EMA, + LoRA weights if applicable)
15. Define load_model_hook(models, input_dir): loads transformer from pretrained subfolder
16. Register hooks with accelerator (skip for FSDP/DeepSpeed distributed types)
17. [Optional] Enable TF32 if allow_tf32
18. [Optional] Scale LR by batch_size * grad_accum * num_processes if scale_lr
19. Select optimizer class: AdamW8bit (bitsandbytes) or torch.optim.AdamW
20. Build parameters_list: either selective modules (transformer_trainable_modules) or all params
21. [FSDP] accelerator.prepare(transformer) before optimizer creation
22. Create optimizer with lr, betas, weight_decay, eps
23. Create lr_scheduler via get_scheduler(config.lr_scheduler, warmup, max_train_steps)
24. [non-FSDP] accelerator.prepare(transformer, optimizer, lr_scheduler)
25. [Main process] Init trackers (wandb) with experiment_name and run/group names
26. resume_from_ckpt(config, accelerator, transformer) → initial_global_step, global_step, first_epoch, loaded_accelerator
27. [Optional] Overwrite LR and recreate lr_scheduler if lr_overwrite
28. [Optional] Reset seed (device_specific=True) for data loading if first run
29. Create dataloaders: get_multi_dataloader(config, accelerator) → train_dataloader, test_dataloader

per_step: if accelerator.sync_gradients: update progress_bar, increment global_step, log train_loss + lr
if global_step % checkpointing_steps == 0: manage checkpoint rotation (remove oldest if over limit), accelerator.save_state(checkpoint-{step}), optionally save_random_state per process
if global_step % job_stop_steps == 0: set break_loop=True, break
if global_step >= max_train_steps: set break_loop=True, break
update progress_bar postfix with step_loss, lr, dir, overflow flag if grad skipped

flow: Move batch tensors to accelerator.device; cast to weight_dtype (except camera intrinsics/c2ws)
Handle variable num_input_multi_views from batch if present
Encode input video: if 'rgb_latents' in batch use directly; else encode via encode_multi_view_video(vae, video, ...); store as batch['images_input_embed']
Compute Plucker embeddings on GPU: get_plucker_embedding_and_rays(intrinsics, c2ws, img_size, patch_size, flip_flag) if compute_plucker_cuda
Extract pred_images, pred_depths, pred_opacity from model_output
Compute losses: compute_loss(accelerator, train_loss, pred_images, gt_images, pred_depths, gt_depths, pred_opacity, config, lpips_loss_module, ...)
if accelerator.sync_gradients: accelerator.clip_grad_norm_(transformer.parameters(), max_grad_norm); check inf/NaN scaler

save_model_hook_flow: Guard: only run on main process
[Optional] save LoRA weights via get_peft_model_state_dict + model.save_lora_weights if use_lora
load_model_hook_flow: For each model in models list: models.pop()
resume_from_ckpt_flow: If resume_from_checkpoint is set: resolve path (explicit or 'latest' via get_most_recent_checkpoint)
If path found: accelerator.load_state(path_ckpt) [preferred]; fallback: load_model_weights(path_ckpt, transformer); fallback: log warning, optionally shutil.rmtree broken ckpt, exit(1)
Parse global_step from checkpoint folder name (checkpoint-{N})
Return initial_global_step, global_step, first_epoch, loaded_accelerator flag
key_conditions: use_fsdp → FSDP plugin, prepare transformer before optimizer, no EMA
use_lora → LoraConfig added to transformer; LoRA layers saved in hooks
use_ema → EMA transformer saved in save_model_hook
resume_from_checkpoint → load state or model-only weights
job_stop_steps → early exit for job scheduling
key_dependencies: Accelerator (accelerate) — distributed training, mixed precision, checkpointing
important_notes: Training loop is epoch-free (while True over batches, terminated by max_train_steps or job_stop_steps). Checkpoints are named checkpoint-{global_step}. Permanent checkpoints at permanent_checkpointing_steps intervals are excluded from rotation. Random states per-process optionally saved for reproducible resumption. Gradient overflow detection via scaler._check_inf_per_device.
